content: Autonomous curiosity intrinsic reward modules (from Topic A's ICM-based curious agents) can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning gate for 2025 SOTA active learning agent long-term memory, only retaining unexpected, learnable new observations instead of compressing or retaining based on recency or reward alone. This creates a 'curiosity-aligned memory' that automatically prioritizes data that will improve the agent's out-of-distribution generalization.
